parameters.jsonBody:
{
  "warehouse_id": "7df93d2122077ac8",
  "statement": "SELECT week_start, total_volume, transaction_count, wow_volume_change_pct, wow_count_change_pct, type_mix_cash_in_pct, type_mix_cash_out_pct, type_mix_transfer_pct, cashout_to_cashin_ratio, top_5_accounts_by_count FROM workspace.default.kpi_weekly WHERE DATE(week_start) = DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS)",
  "wait_timeout": "30s",
  "catalog": "workspace",
  "schema": "default"
}

parameters.content:
## Weekly Performance Summary
- Runs every Monday at 11:10 AM. 

- Queries last week's aggregated performance metrics including transaction mix, cashout ratio and top accounts, and delivers a week-over-week summary to Telegram.
